title: Senior Site Reliability / DevOps Engineer
responsibilities: Designing, implementing, and maintaining infrastructure as code using Terraform and Ansible
Building, operating, and supporting highly available cloud-native platforms on AKS/EKS
Implementing observability, incident management, and monitoring using Managed Prometheus, Grafana, and Azure Monitor
Automating infrastructure changes, operating system patching, and application deployments using Jenkins and Ansible
Ensuring release safety and compliance by defining golden signals and production-readiness checklists
Collaborating with platform, development, and security teams in Agile environments
kpis: Improving deployment reliability and reducing operational toil through automation and standardized release practices
Improving rollback frequency and reducing MTTR by 25–40%
Improving on-call consistency and time to mitigation

Prometheus, Grafana, ELK Stack, CloudWatch, alerting integrations like PagerDuty / Opsgenie
